name: moonshot
description: Moonshot AI (Kimi) models. Set MOONSHOT_BASE_URL to override the default endpoint (e.g. https://api.moonshot.ai/v1 for international users).

env_vars.name: MOONSHOT_BASE_URL
env_vars.description: Moonshot API base URL. Use https://api.moonshot.ai/v1 for international access outside China Mainland.
